problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating may resolve What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
